rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities before assert
Known correct Claude Code facts (Agent tool, /rename, /memory, auto-memory path)
Auto-load is filename-based (CLAUDE.md / CLAUDE.local.md / ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md); .claude/memory/ does NOT auto-load — body says so explicitly
Sessions are the unit of work — 'start a new Claude Code session'
Cultural-vocabulary names (Huryn, Klaassen) — name-only allowed under 2026-05-15 carve-out; named technique flagged in maintainer block
Freshness 6 months
Zombie stat guard
No [BRACKET] placeholders inside fences; open-hook in Prompt 1 ends with 'Candidates:'
One-sentence action lead-in present for all four prompts
Canonical Prompt shape — lead-in, label with destination, fenced block
Skills by name, never by path
Chain by back-reference and deterministic path — 'the task we just scoped' / 'Rearrange what's there'
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight in Claude Code
rules_evaluated.evidence: walk-and-send-off-1.md fenced block uses `- **Send-off shape:** ...`, `- **Requirement-weaving:** ...`, `- **Multi-file reasoning:** ...`; pasted asterisks render literal in Claude Code input.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Drop the asterisks: `- Send-off shape:` etc. Stylistic prompt-mechanic nit; non-blocking per technical-judge criteria.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Preamble suppressor / body primer when 4+ sub-steps or plan mode
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompts 1, 2, 4 have multiple steps but no plan-mode invocation; rule trigger not met (4+ named sub-steps OR plan mode). Tolerable.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No CWD restatement inside prompt body
Subagent allowed in prompt blocks; explain why outside fence — Prompt 2 names 'sub-task via the Agent tool' with body reason
Strong-bold prompt label is exactly `**Prompt**`
Marker `{{prompt:<key>}}` resolves to registry file under curriculum/prompts/
No M-number references in prompt prose; branch-name code spans (`m4/<slug>`) exempt
Forcing functions live in prompts (audit + Huryn rearrangement encoded in prompts, not body)
Verification machinery needs smoke-test
Context-loading tiers — Phase 2 audit names CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE.local.md, .claude/memory/, ADRs, skills (.claude/skills + ~/.claude/skills), connectors

platform_claims_checked.claim: Start a new Claude Code session at your repo root
spawn a sub-task via the Agent tool
Claude Code auto-memory at ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/ surfaced via /memory
Laptop-sleep freezes session; Ctrl+C mid-tool-call can corrupt .jsonl; no per-session token budget
